title: Easy Monster Truck Jumping Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Monster Truck Jumping Stunt Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Download this simple monster truck jumping off a dirt ramp coloring page. Bold lines for kids. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: monster trucks are custom-built vehicles featuring massive 66-inch tires and high-output engines producing up to 1,500 horsepower.
The monster truck uses long-travel nitrogen shock absorbers to cushion landing forces from jumps exceeding 30 feet.
